48.reason: [The condition checks if the fault list size is exactly 3, but the problem requires outputting all errors sorted by line number. This condition will incorrectly suppress output when there are fewer or more than 3 errors.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition checks if the fault list size is exactly 3, but the problem requires outputting all errors sorted by line number. This condition will incorrectly suppress output when there are fewer or more than 3 errors.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition checks if the fault list size is exactly 3, but it should check if it's not empty to print all errors. This causes the function to return early for any number of errors other than 3, preventing error output.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  错误：要求错误数量恰好为3，否则直接返回，导致多数错误无法输出
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: condition should not require exactly 3 errors; prevents printing for any other number of errors
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Hardcoded condition prevents error output unless exactly 3 errors are recorded, causing valid error reports to be silently dropped
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition incorrectly requires exactly 3 errors to output anything, but the problem requires outputting all errors regardless of count]

52.reason: [This condition checks if all error codes are 'i', but the problem requires outputting all errors regardless of their code. This will incorrectly suppress output when there are errors with codes other than 'i'.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition checks if all error codes are 'i', but the problem requires outputting all errors regardless of their code. This will incorrectly suppress output when there are errors with codes other than 'i'.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition returns if any error code is not 'i', meaning only errors of type 'i' (missing semicolon) will be printed, and all other error types are ignored.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  错误：要求所有错误码均为'i'，否则返回，导致其他类型错误被忽略
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Hardcoded condition restricts output to only error code 'i', causing all other syntax errors (like j, k, a) to be ignored
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This loop exits if any error is not type 'i', but the program should output all error types]

63.reason: [This condition checks if the error code is a digit (0-9), but the problem only defines error codes 'a' to 'm'. This condition will incorrectly suppress output for valid error codes.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition checks if the error code is a digit (0-9), but the problem only defines error codes 'a' to 'm'. This condition will incorrectly suppress output for valid error codes.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition returns if debug is false and the error code is a digit (0-9), which are internal error codes. This prevents printing any errors when debug is false, which is the normal mode.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  错误：debug为true时跳过内部错误码检查，但前面已经限制了错误码，此处多余
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: filtering out internal error codes is incorrect; should not return here
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Hardcoded condition incorrectly filters out valid error codes based on ASCII digit range, preventing normal error output
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition filters out numeric error codes in non-debug mode, but all valid error codes should be output]

1671.reason: Error: getToken may return OUT_INDEX with null tokenType, causing NullPointerException; also incorrect condition for detecting functions

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: getToken may return OUT_INDEX with null tokenType, causing NullPointerException; also incorrect condition for detecting functions
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead: getToken may return Token.OUT_INDEX which has a null tokenType, causing NullPointerException, or index may exceed list bounds causing IndexOutOfBoundsException
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.05 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead: if index+2 exceeds list size, getToken returns OUT_INDEX with null tokenType, causing infinite loops or incorrect parsing.

1674.reason: Error: same issue; may cause NullPointerException and incorrect loop termination

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: same issue; may cause NullPointerException and incorrect loop termination
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead: same risk of NullPointerException or IndexOutOfBoundsException when parsing near the end of the token list
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.05 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead: if index+1 exceeds list size, getToken returns OUT_INDEX with null tokenType, causing infinite loops or incorrect parsing.

2117.reason: Unsafe direct list access: index + 1 may exceed tokenList size causing IndexOutOfBoundsException, and Token.OUT_INDEX has null tokenType leading to NullPointerException

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Unsafe direct list access: index + 1 may exceed tokenList size causing IndexOutOfBoundsException, and Token.OUT_INDEX has null tokenType leading to NullPointerException
